$comment: NEGATIVE-VALIDATION FIXTURE (P1 W6-T4) — a FAILED `npm audit` run.
When npm audit cannot reach the registry it still emits VALID JSON (an error
envelope), and CI masks npm's non-zero exit via `|| true`. The gate must NOT
treat this as 'zero advisories => PASS' (a false-green). Piping this into
scripts/npm-audit-gate.mjs MUST exit 1. Evidence-only; CI does not consume it.

error.detail: simulated registry-unreachable failure for negative validation
